description: You are a GIS Platform Architect preparing for a high-traffic public map launch. Log in to GeoServer at http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ (admin / Admin123!). Configure tile caching for the ne:ne_countries layer to include the EPSG:900913 (Web Mercator) gridset, image/png format, and a metatiling factor of 4x4 or larger. Additionally, perform a tile seeding operation for the ne:ne_countries layer using the EPSG:4326 gridset and image/png format for zoom levels 0 to 3, covering the full world extent (minX=-180, minY=-90, maxX=180, maxY=90).
